tweets.author: thebitcoinstrategy.bsky.social
tweets.text: The bearish data is also real. TVL collapsed from nearly $12 billion to under $500 million, a 95% drop. Social mentions are declining. AVAX has underperformed Bitcoin and the broader altcoin market on a consistent, multi-year trend.

tweets.author: thebitcoinstrategy.bsky.social
tweets.text: Token inflation is a big part of the story. Supply is expanding roughly 10% over the next 12 months. Bitcoin is at 0.8%. For #AVAX to outperform, adoption growth has to outrun that dilution. Right now the onchain data does not confirm that is happening.
